Entity-family ownership is primarily defined by dedicated runtime code files and corresponding integration test suites. Drones are owned by `entities/drone_flat/drone_flat.gd` (runtime) and tested via `tests/integration/entities/drone_flat/`. Frigates are owned by `entities/frigate_flat/frigate.gd` (runtime) with tests in `tests/integration/entities/frigate_flat/`.
